item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: PlaguePJP summarized my thoughts perfectly. Seconding all of it. I still quite liked it though, I will say that much.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Oh, this is good.
My favorite part are the video logs from the night before, especially the hints that Skippy's breakdown is at least in part because they've been legitimately trying to make the best of their situation and are upset about everything falling apart in spite of it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This was a tough one for me, I ultimately decided to upvote because I like the idea and parts of the execution. but I have a few issues:

  • The first log could be trimmed down and the humorous beats within it need to be combed through a bit. I really liked Skippy’s entrance, everyone ignoring it, and the upskirting scheme. My issue here is that, at the end, the humor boils down to Skippy cursing and insulting people. After the first few times, it’s not funny.
  • While this is a matter of opinion, I feel like Skippy should be characterized more along the lines of a disillusioned performer who doesn’t feel respected. There are definite hints of this, but it needed to be developed further because the main character trait in left with at the end is, angry Scottish man.
  • The logs at the end do drag a bit. The first three serve pretty much the same purpose, ie, Skippy is clumsy. For pacing’s sake, one should be cut or combined into another one.

I wanted to like this one much more. What’s here is good just it can be better.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I’m conflicted here. The logs drag quite a bit; the dialogue is wonky in places, and it’s not enough to provide a decent voltage throughout the article. That’s not to say I didn’t enjoy it in places; I just didn’t feel like it had a lot to say in the beginning.

Novoting for now. I’ll reread this in the morning and see how I feel about it then.

Edit: I reread this, and I decided I like it enough to upvote.

item.title: Masterfull!
item.content:encoded:
Good comedy story. The second log gave me some tears.

with bears and bunnies and shit

O_o, +1 for that fnaf reference alone.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Upvoting because the first log made me laugh a lot but I feel the second log did drag on a bit

There’s so many scenes/lines in this to compliment, I won’t be listing them all. But the Karen line and the moment with the mylar balloon are particular favorites.

At once both hilarious and pathetically sympathetic… I think you’ve both done a great job bringing this poor, benighted animatronic to life (see what I did there?)

+1

item.title: CO-AUTHOR POST
item.content:encoded:
My co-author deserves the lion's share of credit here, the concept was his and he took the first stab at every scene before I swooped in and Harrified them. It was tremendous fun and I'm proud of the nonsense we wrote together!

We'd like to thank Grigori Karpin for the use of his eyes and brain.

The image is mine, released under CC 3.0.

item.title: AUTHOR POST
item.content:encoded:
This article was a tribute to chucke e cheese, since it's practically going to go bankrupt at this point. Even I think that place leaves a lot to be desired, I can't deny it had a effect on kids around the world.

  • HarryBlank was my coauthor in this piece, and help create the image. I wouldn't be able to get this polished out without his help. I hope you enjoy this piece.
